name: Archelomon

signature_move.name: Ocean Strom
signature_move.description: Generates a gigantic whirlpool in the ocean, submerging the opponent.

description: An Armor-level Reptile Digimon which evolved through the power of the " Digimental of Sincerity ". It has the appearance of a large sea turtle, and both of its flippers have become sharp like knives. It doesn't move around particularly quickly even underwater, and has a carefree personality, but because it has sharp fore-flippers and a sturdy shell, it's rarely assaulted by the enemy. Its Special Move is generating a gigantic whirlpool in the ocean, submerging the opponent ( Ocean Strom ).
